jobs.title: Backend Developer
jobs.description: Design, build, and maintain the server-side logic and databases that power our applications. You will collaborate with frontend developers and product managers to deliver scalable, secure APIs and services. Your work ensures our platform stays fast, reliable, and ready to handle millions of requests. We value clean code, thorough testing, and proactive performance optimization.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent practical experience)
requirements.experience: 2+ years building backend systems with Python, Java, or Node.js
requirements.skills: Strong understanding of RESTful APIs, database design, and cloud platforms like AWS/GCP
requirements.certifications: Relevant cloud or software certifications are a plus

benefits.health: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
benefits.leave: 20 days paid vacation plus sick leave
benefits.remote: Hybrid or fully remote options available
benefits.growth: Annual training budget and conference attendance

jobs.title: Frontend Developer
jobs.description: Translate beautiful designs into responsive, high-performance user interfaces using modern JavaScript frameworks. You will work closely with designers and backend engineers to craft seamless, accessible web experiences. Attention to detail and a passion for user experience are essential. Join a team that values code quality, reusable components, and iterative improvement.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree preferred, or strong portfolio of past projects
requirements.experience: 2+ years developing with React, Vue, or Angular
requirements.skills: Proficiency in HTML/CSS, modern JavaScript, and responsive design
requirements.portfolio: GitHub or live project links required

benefits.flexible_hours: Flexible schedule with core overlap hours
benefits.equipment: Latest MacBook Pro and peripherals provided
benefits.growth: Learning stipend for courses and certifications

jobs.title: Full Stack Developer
jobs.description: Build features end-to-end, from database schema to user interface. You'll take ownership of projects in a fast-paced, agile environment. We need someone comfortable with both frontend frameworks and backend architecture, who can also contribute to DevOps and deployment pipelines. Your ability to quickly switch context and solve problems across the stack is key.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in CS or equivalent bootcamp + experience
requirements.experience: 3+ years building and shipping full stack applications
requirements.skills: Proficient in at least one backend language and one modern frontend framework
requirements.other: Experience with containerization (Docker) and CI/CD preferred

benefits.health: Full family medical, dental, and vision
benefits.growth: Budget for online courses, books, and conferences
benefits.wellness: Wellness allowance for gym or meditation apps

jobs.title: Mobile App Developer
jobs.description: Develop native iOS and Android applications that delight our users. You'll work on new features from concept to App Store release, optimizing for performance and battery life. We encourage creative solutions and clean code that passes rigorous testing. Help shape a product used by millions daily.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree or equivalent technical training
requirements.experience: 2+ years with Swift/Kotlin or React Native
requirements.skills: Strong understanding of mobile UI guidelines and offline storage
requirements.portfolio: Apps published in App Store/Google Play a plus

benefits.equipment: Choice of Mac or PC setup

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Bridge development and operations by automating infrastructure, deployments, and monitoring. You'll maintain CI/CD pipelines, manage cloud resources, and improve system reliability. Your work empowers the entire engineering team to ship faster and more safely. We value a culture of shared responsibility and blameless post-mortems.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in CS, IT, or related field
requirements.experience: 3+ years in DevOps or SRE role
requirements.skills: Expertise with Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, and major cloud providers

benefits.on-call: Compensated on-call rotation with additional time off

jobs.title: Software QA Engineer
jobs.description: Ensure our applications perform flawlessly by designing test strategies, writing automated test scripts, and performing manual exploratory testing. You'll work alongside developers to catch regressions early and advocate for quality throughout the development lifecycle. We believe testing is a shared responsibility and you'll help foster that culture.

requirements.education: Bachelor's in Computer Science or related field
requirements.skills: Experience with Selenium, Cypress, or similar tools; scripting in Python or JavaScript
requirements.mindset: Passion for breaking things and improving user experience

jobs.title: Embedded Systems Engineer
jobs.description: Develop firmware and software for microcontrollers and IoT devices. You'll work close to the hardware, optimizing for memory, power, and real-time constraints. We're building the next generation of connected devices, and your deep understanding of C/C++ and hardware interfaces will be critical.

requirements.education: Bachelor's in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, or equivalent
requirements.skills: Proficient in C/C++, RTOS, and reading schematics
requirements.tools: Experience with oscilloscopes and logic analyzers

benefits.growth: Funding for professional memberships and courses

jobs.title: Security Engineer
jobs.description: Protect our products and infrastructure from threats by designing secure architectures, conducting penetration tests, and building security tooling. You'll work across teams to embed security into the SDLC and respond to incidents. We're committed to creating a security-first culture.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Cybersecurity, CS, or related field
requirements.certifications: CISSP, CEH, or OSCP strongly preferred
requirements.skills: Deep knowledge of network protocols, encryption, and cloud security

benefits.growth: Annual budget for security conferences (BlackHat, Defcon)

jobs.title: UI/UX Designer
jobs.description: Craft intuitive, beautiful experiences for our digital products. You'll conduct user research, create wireframes and prototypes, and hand off pixel-perfect designs. We look for designers who balance aesthetics with usability and data-driven decisions. Your designs will shape the way thousands of users interact with our platform every day.

requirements.education: Degree in Design, HCI, or equivalent experience
requirements.skills: Expert in Figma; experience with user testing and design systems
requirements.portfolio: Portfolio showcasing problem-solving and design process

jobs.title: Graphic Designer
jobs.description: Create compelling visual assets for marketing campaigns, social media, and brand identity. You'll develop concepts that communicate our brand values and engage audiences across multiple channels. A strong eye for typography, color, and composition is essential, as is the ability to manage multiple projects with quick turnarounds.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design or related field
requirements.experience: 2+ years in a design studio or agency
requirements.skills: Advanced skills in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)
requirements.portfolio: Strong portfolio demonstrating branding and campaign work

jobs.title: Product Designer
jobs.description: Own the end-to-end design process for new features, from discovery and ideation to high-fidelity mockups and usability testing. You'll partner with product managers and engineers to balance user needs with business goals. We value designers who think strategically and iterate quickly based on feedback.

requirements.education: Degree in Design, HCI, or comparable experience
requirements.skills: Expert in Figma, prototyping tools, and user research methods
requirements.portfolio: Must include case studies with measurable impact

jobs.title: Motion Designer
jobs.description: Bring our brand to life through animation and motion graphics for product demos, advertisements, and social content. You'll collaborate with video editors and marketers to create cohesive storytelling that captivates viewers. A strong grasp of timing, easing, and visual narrative is required.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Motion Design, Animation, or related field
requirements.skills: Expert in After Effects, Premiere Pro, and Cinema 4D/Blender

jobs.title: UX Researcher
jobs.description: Lead user research initiatives to uncover deep insights about our customers. You'll design and conduct usability studies, interviews, and surveys, then synthesize findings into actionable recommendations. Your work will directly influence product strategy and feature prioritization.

requirements.education: Master's degree in HCI, Psychology, Anthropology, or related field preferred
requirements.experience: 2+ years in UX research or similar role
requirements.skills: Mixed-methods expertise, statistical analysis, and storytelling

jobs.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
jobs.description: Plan and execute digital campaigns across SEO, SEM, email, and social media to drive traffic and conversions. You'll analyze performance data, optimize spend, and experiment with new channels. We need someone data-driven yet creative, ready to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, or Communications
requirements.skills: Proficient in Google Analytics, Ads, and marketing automation tools

jobs.title: SEO Specialist
jobs.description: Improve organic search visibility and ranking through technical audits, keyword research, and content optimization. You'll monitor algorithm changes, analyze competitors, and collaborate with content teams to increase targeted traffic. Your strategies will directly impact revenue growth.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree or relevant experience
requirements.skills: Mastery of SEO tools (Ahrefs, SEMrush), HTML/CSS basics, and Google Search Console

jobs.title: Content Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Develop and execute a content strategy that educates our audience and generates leads. You'll oversee blog posts, whitepapers, case studies, and videos, managing a team of writers and freelancers. Success is measured by engagement, lead quality, and brand authority growth.

requirements.education: Bachelor's in Journalism, Marketing, or English
requirements.skills: Exceptional writing/editing, project management, and familiarity with CMS platforms

jobs.title: Social Media Manager
jobs.description: Grow our brand's presence across Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and Twitter through engaging content and community interaction. You'll plan monthly calendars, analyze metrics, and jump on trends while maintaining brand voice. You're the voice of the company online.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing or related field
requirements.skills: Strong copywriting, basic graphic/video editing, platform analytics

jobs.title: Growth Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Drive rapid user acquisition through experimentation across channels, including paid ads, referrals, and viral loops. You'll build growth models, run A/B tests, and optimize the entire funnel. We need a data-obsessed marketer who isn't afraid to fail fast and scale what works.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Statistics, or Business
requirements.experience: 3+ years in growth or performance marketing
requirements.skills: SQL, Excel, BI tools, and hands-on experience with ad platforms

jobs.title: Sales Executive
jobs.description: Prospect, pitch, and close deals with mid-market and enterprise clients. You'll manage the entire sales cycle, from lead qualification to contract signing. We provide extensive training and a supportive team environment. Your results directly fuel company growth.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience in sales
requirements.experience: 2+ years B2B sales experience with a track record of meeting quotas
requirements.skills: Strong negotiation and presentation abilities; CRM proficiency (Salesforce)

jobs.title: Account Manager
jobs.description: Nurture relationships with existing clients, ensuring they receive maximum value from our products. You'll identify upsell opportunities, handle renewals, and act as the voice of the customer internally. Building trust and long-term partnerships is the core of this role.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business or related field
requirements.experience: 3+ years in account management or customer success
requirements.skills: Excellent interpersonal skills and experience with CRM software

jobs.title: Business Development Representative
jobs.description: Generate pipeline by researching and contacting potential clients through cold calls, emails, and social outreach. You'll qualify leads and set meetings for senior sales executives. This role offers a clear path to a closing position.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree preferred
requirements.skills: Strong communication, resilience, and organizational skills

jobs.title: Customer Support Representative
jobs.description: Provide world-class support via phone, chat, and email, resolving customer issues with empathy and efficiency. You'll troubleshoot problems, document solutions, and escalate when necessary. We're looking for patient problem-solvers who truly enjoy helping others.

requirements.education: High school diploma; some college preferred
requirements.experience: Previous customer service experience a plus
requirements.skills: Strong written and verbal communication; basic technical aptitude

benefits.growth: Internal career path to advanced support or management

jobs.title: Technical Support Specialist
jobs.description: Assist users with complex technical issues, reproducing bugs and guiding them through advanced troubleshooting. You'll bridge the gap between customers and engineering, ensuring issues are resolved accurately and promptly. A curious mind and love for technology are essential.

requirements.education: Associate's degree or technical certifications
requirements.skills: Familiarity with command line, SQL queries, and reading logs

jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
jobs.description: Proactively ensure customers achieve their desired outcomes using our product. You'll onboard new accounts, conduct regular check-ins, and drive product adoption. Your success is measured by customer retention and satisfaction scores.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business or related field
requirements.experience: 3+ years in customer success or account management
requirements.skills: Strong analytical, presentation, and relationship-building skills

jobs.title: Finance Analyst
jobs.description: Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial reporting to drive strategic decisions. You'll build financial models, analyze variances, and prepare presentations for leadership. We need someone with strong analytical skills and attention to detail.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, or Economics
requirements.skills: Advanced Excel, PowerPoint; experience with ERP systems a plus

jobs.title: Accountant
jobs.description: Maintain financial records, prepare monthly closing entries, and reconcile accounts. You'll ensure compliance with GAAP and support external audits. We value meticulousness and a proactive approach to process improvement.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Accounting
requirements.skills: Proficiency in QuickBooks or NetSuite; strong Excel skills

jobs.title: Operations Coordinator
jobs.description: Keep our internal processes running like a well-oiled machine. You'll handle scheduling, vendor coordination, and administrative projects. You thrive in a role that demands organization and the ability to juggle multiple priorities calmly.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business Administration or related field
requirements.experience: 1+ years in an operations or administrative role
requirements.skills: Excellent Excel, project management tools, and written communication

jobs.title: Project Manager
jobs.description: Lead cross-functional projects from initiation to closure, ensuring they stay on schedule and within budget. You'll coordinate resources, manage risks, and communicate status to stakeholders. PMP or agile certification is strongly preferred.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business or technical field
requirements.skills: Proficient with Jira, Asana, or MS Project
requirements.certifications: PMP, PRINCE2, or Scrum Master certification preferred

jobs.title: Supply Chain Analyst
jobs.description: Analyze supply chain data to improve efficiency, reduce costs, and ensure timely delivery. You'll forecast demand, track inventory levels, and collaborate with suppliers. Your insights will directly impact our bottom line.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Supply Chain, Logistics, or Business
requirements.experience: 2+ years in supply chain or logistics analysis
requirements.skills: Advanced Excel, ERP systems (SAP/Oracle), and analytical modeling

jobs.title: HR Assistant
jobs.description: Support the HR team with recruitment coordination, onboarding paperwork, and employee record management. You'll be the first friendly face new hires see. Attention to detail and confidentiality are crucial.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in HR or related field
requirements.experience: 1+ year in administrative or HR role
requirements.skills: Proficiency in MS Office and HRIS systems

jobs.title: Recruiter
jobs.description: Source, screen, and attract top talent to join our company. You'll partner with hiring managers, manage the full recruitment cycle, and build a strong employer brand. We value creative sourcing strategies and excellent candidate experience.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in HR, Business, or Psychology
requirements.experience: 2+ years in corporate or agency recruiting
requirements.skills: ATS proficiency (Greenhouse/Lever), LinkedIn Recruiter expertise

jobs.title: Teacher
jobs.description: Deliver engaging lessons, assess student progress, and foster a positive learning environment. You'll adapt curriculum to diverse learning styles and collaborate with parents. A passion for inspiring young minds is non-negotiable.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Education or subject area; state teaching license
requirements.skills: Strong presentation and behavior management skills

jobs.title: Corporate Trainer
jobs.description: Design and deliver training programs that enhance employee skills and leadership capabilities. You'll assess training needs, develop engaging content, and measure effectiveness. Join a team that believes continuous learning is a competitive advantage.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Education, HR, or related field
requirements.experience: 3+ years in corporate training or L&D
requirements.skills: Experience with LMS platforms and content authoring tools

jobs.title: Registered Nurse
jobs.description: Provide compassionate patient care including assessment, medication administration, and treatment planning. You'll collaborate with physicians and educate patients and families. A valid nursing license and commitment to patient advocacy are required.

requirements.education: BSN or ADN from accredited program; active RN license
requirements.skills: Strong clinical judgment and electronic health record proficiency

benefits.leave: Generous PTO and paid sick leave

jobs.title: Medical Assistant
jobs.description: Support clinical operations by rooming patients, taking vitals, administering injections, and maintaining electronic health records. You'll be the backbone of a busy practice, ensuring patients feel comfortable and well-informed.

requirements.education: Medical Assistant certification from accredited program
requirements.skills: CPR certified, comfortable with EMR systems

jobs.title: Pharmacist
jobs.description: Dispense medications accurately, counsel patients on proper usage, and monitor for drug interactions. You'll oversee pharmacy technicians and ensure compliance with all regulations. A Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) and active license are required.

requirements.education: Pharm.D. degree; state pharmacy license
requirements.experience: 1+ years in retail or hospital pharmacy
requirements.skills: Strong clinical knowledge and communication

jobs.title: Physical Therapist
jobs.description: Evaluate and treat patients with movement disorders, creating personalized rehabilitation plans. You'll help patients regain mobility, reduce pain, and prevent further injury. A DPT degree and state licensure are mandatory.

requirements.education: Doctor of Physical Therapy (DPT) degree

jobs.title: Lab Technician
jobs.description: Perform diagnostic tests on patient samples, operate lab analyzers, and maintain quality control records. Accuracy and speed are crucial in this fast-paced environment. An associate degree in medical lab technology is the minimum.

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Medical Laboratory Technology

jobs.title: Civil Engineer
jobs.description: Design and oversee infrastructure projects such as roads, bridges, and water systems. You'll perform structural calculations, prepare drawings, and ensure compliance with regulations. A PE license or progress toward it is highly valued.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering
requirements.experience: 2+ years in civil design or construction
requirements.skills: Proficient in AutoCAD Civil 3D and hydraulic modeling

benefits.growth: PE exam fees and study materials covered

jobs.title: Site Supervisor
jobs.description: Lead daily operations on construction sites, managing crews, schedules, and safety compliance. You'll coordinate subcontractors and ensure work meets quality standards and deadlines. Strong leadership and problem-solving on your feet are a must.

requirements.education: High school diploma; trade school or degree preferred
requirements.experience: 5+ years in construction with 2+ in supervisory role

jobs.title: Electrician
jobs.description: Install, maintain, and repair electrical systems in residential, commercial, or industrial settings. You'll read blueprints, troubleshoot faults, and ensure code compliance. A journeyman license is preferred.

requirements.education: Completed apprenticeship or technical school

jobs.title: Plumber
jobs.description: Install and repair piping, fixtures, and appliances for water, gas, and drainage. You'll diagnose issues, cut and solder pipe, and ensure all work meets plumbing codes. A stable, in-demand career with excellent pay.

requirements.education: Apprenticeship completion

jobs.title: Architect
jobs.description: Design functional, sustainable buildings and spaces, from concept sketches to detailed construction documents. You'll coordinate with engineers and clients, ensuring aesthetic and regulatory requirements are met. Proficiency in BIM software is required.

requirements.education: Professional degree in Architecture (B.Arch/M.Arch)
requirements.licensure: Working toward ARE licensure; LEED accreditation a plus
requirements.skills: Expert in Revit, AutoCAD, and rendering software

jobs.title: Warehouse Supervisor
jobs.description: Oversee warehouse operations including receiving, storage, picking, and shipping. You'll lead a team, enforce safety protocols, and meet daily productivity targets. We need a hands-on leader who can thrive in a fast-paced environment.

requirements.education: High school diploma; associate's degree preferred
requirements.experience: 3+ years in warehouse operations, 1+ in supervisory role
requirements.skills: Familiarity with WMS and forklift certification

jobs.title: Truck Driver
jobs.description: Safely transport goods over local or regional routes, adhering to all traffic laws and delivery schedules. You'll perform vehicle inspections and maintain accurate logs. A CDL and clean driving record are essential.

requirements.education: High school diploma; CDL class A required
requirements.skills: Clean driving record; ability to pass DOT physical

jobs.title: Supply Chain Manager
jobs.description: Strategically oversee end-to-end supply chain activities, from procurement to last-mile delivery. You'll optimize costs, mitigate risks, and build strong vendor relationships. This role directly impacts customer satisfaction and profitability.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Supply Chain, Logistics, or Business
requirements.skills: Experience with SAP or Oracle SCM; strong analytical abilities

jobs.title: Logistics Coordinator
jobs.description: Coordinate shipments, track inventory, and communicate with carriers and customers to ensure on-time delivery. You'll solve routing issues and handle documentation. Fast-paced role ideal for a detail-oriented multitasker.

requirements.education: Associate's degree or equivalent experience
requirements.skills: Proficient in TMS and MS Office

jobs.title: Hotel Receptionist
jobs.description: Welcome guests, manage check-ins/outs, answer inquiries, and handle reservations. You are the face of the hotel, creating a warm first impression. We seek a friendly, organized individual who can multitask under pressure.

requirements.education: High school diploma; hospitality degree a plus
requirements.skills: Proficient in property management systems like Opera

jobs.title: Restaurant Manager
jobs.description: Manage daily restaurant operations including staff scheduling, inventory, and ensuring an exceptional dining experience. You'll uphold health codes, handle customer feedback, and drive revenue targets. A passion for food and leadership is key.

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Hospitality or equivalent experience

jobs.title: Chef
jobs.description: Lead the kitchen team, design menus, and ensure every dish meets high standards. You'll manage food costs, order supplies, and maintain a clean, safe kitchen. Creativity and consistency define success.

requirements.education: Culinary degree or equivalent apprenticeship
requirements.experience: 4+ years in a professional kitchen, 2 as sous chef

jobs.title: Event Coordinator
jobs.description: Plan and execute flawless events—from corporate conferences to wedding receptions. You'll coordinate vendors, manage budgets, and ensure every detail is perfect. Your ability to stay calm under pressure makes events memorable.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Event Management or Hospitality
requirements.skills: Strong organizational and negotiation skills

jobs.title: Housekeeping Supervisor
jobs.description: Lead the housekeeping team to maintain the highest standards of cleanliness in guest rooms and public areas. You'll inspect rooms, manage linen inventory, and train staff. A keen eye for detail ensures every guest enjoys a pristine environment.

requirements.education: High school diploma
requirements.experience: 2+ years in housekeeping, with supervisory experience
requirements.skills: Knowledge of cleaning chemicals and protocols

jobs.title: Content Creator
jobs.description: Produce engaging video and written content for platforms like YouTube, TikTok, and our website. You'll brainstorm ideas, film, edit, and analyze performance metrics. We need a creative storyteller who understands viral trends.

requirements.education: Degree in Media, Communications, or equivalent experience
requirements.skills: Proficient in Premiere Pro, After Effects, and on-camera presence

jobs.title: Video Editor
jobs.description: Transform raw footage into polished, compelling videos for marketing, social media, and internal communications. You'll handle color grading, sound mixing, and motion graphics. Efficiency and storytelling sense are critical.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Film, Media, or related field
requirements.skills: Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, and After Effects

jobs.title: Journalist
jobs.description: Research, write, and report on breaking news and feature stories across digital and print platforms. You'll conduct interviews, verify facts, and meet tight deadlines. A nose for news and impeccable writing ethics are essential.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Journalism or Communications
requirements.experience: 2+ years in a newsroom or similar environment
requirements.skills: Strong AP style writing and multimedia storytelling

jobs.title: Photographer
jobs.description: Capture high-quality images for editorial, commercial, or portrait use. You'll operate professional camera equipment, edit photos in Lightroom/Photoshop, and manage digital asset libraries. A strong portfolio that demonstrates creative range is a must.

requirements.education: Degree in Photography or equivalent experience
requirements.skills: Proficient in DSLR/mirrorless systems and Adobe Creative Suite

jobs.title: Podcast Producer
jobs.description: Manage the end-to-end production of our podcast series, from booking guests to editing episodes and publishing. You'll ensure high audio quality, consistent branding, and engaging show notes. Experience with remote recording tools is a plus.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Media or Communications
requirements.experience: 2+ years in podcast or radio production
requirements.skills: ProTools or Audition expertise, strong organizational skills

jobs.title: Security Guard
jobs.description: Protect property, personnel, and assets by patrolling premises, monitoring surveillance equipment, and controlling access points. You'll respond to incidents and write detailed reports. Reliability and a calm demeanor are crucial.

requirements.education: High school diploma; security license required
requirements.experience: 0-2 years; prior military or law enforcement a plus
requirements.skills: Strong observational skills and physical fitness

jobs.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
jobs.description: Monitor networks for security breaches, investigate incidents, and implement protective measures. You'll conduct vulnerability assessments and help develop security policies. A CEH, Sec+, or CISSP certification is highly valued.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Cybersecurity or IT
requirements.experience: 2+ years in a SOC or security analyst role
requirements.certifications: CompTIA Security+; CISSP or CEH preferred

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description: Turn raw data into actionable insights by building dashboards, running SQL queries, and performing statistical analysis. You'll work closely with business stakeholders to answer key questions and drive data-informed decisions. Strong storytelling with data is essential.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Math, CS, or Economics
requirements.skills: Expert in SQL, Tableau/Power BI, and Excel; Python/R a plus

jobs.title: Data Scientist
jobs.description: Develop machine learning models and advanced analytics to solve complex business problems. You'll work with large datasets, design experiments, and deploy models to production. A strong foundation in statistics and programming is required.

requirements.education: Master's or PhD in a quantitative field
requirements.skills: Proficient in Python (scikit-learn, TensorFlow), SQL, and cloud ML platforms

jobs.title: Business Intelligence Analyst
jobs.description: Design and maintain BI solutions that provide visibility into company performance. You'll gather requirements, build ETL pipelines, and create dashboards. Help leaders see the numbers that matter most.

requirements.education: Bachelor's in Information Systems or Business
requirements.skills: Power BI/Looker/Tableau expert, SQL, data modeling

jobs.title: Legal Counsel
jobs.description: Advise the company on contracts, compliance, intellectual property, and risk management. You'll draft and negotiate agreements, and work with external counsel when needed. A strong business acumen combined with legal expertise is critical.

requirements.education: Juris Doctor (JD) and active bar membership
requirements.experience: 4+ years in corporate law, either in-house or at a firm
requirements.skills: Excellent drafting and negotiation skills

jobs.title: Paralegal
jobs.description: Support attorneys by conducting legal research, drafting documents, and organizing case files. You'll manage deadlines and assist with trial preparation. A paralegal certificate and meticulous organizational skills are required.

requirements.education: Associate's degree or paralegal certificate
requirements.experience: 2+ years in a law firm or legal department
requirements.skills: Proficiency with legal research tools (Westlaw, LexisNexis)

jobs.title: Real Estate Agent
jobs.description: Guide buyers and sellers through property transactions, from listing to closing. You'll prospect for clients, host open houses, and negotiate offers. An active real estate license and a passion for helping people are essential.

requirements.education: High school diploma; state real estate license
requirements.skills: Strong networking and communication abilities

jobs.title: Property Manager
jobs.description: Oversee residential or commercial properties, handling tenant relations, maintenance requests, and lease renewals. You'll coordinate with contractors and ensure properties are well-maintained and profitable.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience
requirements.certifications: CPM or CAM certification a plus

jobs.title: Leasing Consultant
jobs.description: Show apartments, process applications, and build relationships with current and prospective residents. You'll help maintain high occupancy rates through excellent customer service and follow-up. Ideal for outgoing, sales-minded individuals.

requirements.education: High school diploma
requirements.experience: 1+ year in sales or customer service
requirements.skills: Proficient in property management software (Yardi, Entrata)
